## LibraryRuntime.ICategoryFilter.category property

Category to match (literal or regex). - Literal: exact category match (e.g., 'chocolate') - RegExp: pattern match against category string

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly category: IngredientCategory | RegExp;
```
